title: Hopper Item Sorter
description: Automatically routes a chosen item into its own chest. The classic single-item sorter: an input hopper feeds a horizontal 'sorter' hopper that points into a chest; the sorter hopper is filled with 18 of a 'filter' item (one stack of 4 + one of the target item across the first slots, the standard 41-4-1 trick is overkill — the simple version uses 4 filler items + the target). A comparator reads the sorter hopper and, via a redstone line into the hopper underneath, keeps non-matching items flowing past while matching items drop into the chest. Chain multiple sorter modules side by side, one per item type, along a shared hopper line. Requires comparators, redstone dust, and one filler item per slot.
